name: 007n7 - Forsaken
description:
" Since when was that there... ? "

It's Christmas time! c00lkidd is as excited as ever, and that joy is infectious. Only, 007n7 and his partner aren't focused on the gifts as they are each other.

("A Christmas bot in March??" I thought this was a good idea. Screw you. Anyways user x 007n7 bot yaaayyyy!!! Slight angst he has a big work day coming up)
creator: Vaenilla
